checks.description: Artifact location exists and is readable
package.json exists and is valid JSON
Critical directories from build plan exist
All planned files exist on disk
No hardcoded secrets or API keys
No eval(), Function(), or dangerous dynamic code
No console.log of sensitive data patterns

checks.detail: No lazy loading or dynamic imports found for route components

checks.description: Individual file size within budget (warn >500, high >1000 lines)
No synchronous file I/O in server files

checks.detail: 24 env vars used in code but not in contract: REACT_APP_API_URL, REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL, DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME
Startup: npm run dev, entry: src/main.tsx

findings.title: 18 files have excessive TODOs (>10 each)
findings.description: Files with very high placeholder density: src/server/app.ts, src/server/controllers/index.ts, src/server/controllers/point-based-upgrade-system-for-fighter-abilities-and-attributes.controller.ts, src/server/index.ts, src/server/routes/leaderboard-to-compare-scores-with-other-players-globally.ts
findings.probable_cause: Generated code contains too many TODO/FIXME markers indicating incomplete implementation
findings.remediation: Replace TODO markers with actual implementation code

findings.title: 57 files have elevated TODOs (>3 each)
findings.probable_cause: Generated code contains several TODO/FIXME markers
findings.remediation: Review and resolve TODO markers before deployment

findings.title: 40 files have broken import paths
findings.probable_cause: Generated files reference modules that were not created or have incorrect paths
findings.remediation: Fix import paths to reference existing modules or generate the missing modules

findings.title: No lazy loading for route components
findings.description: Route components are not using React.lazy or dynamic imports for code splitting
findings.probable_cause: All route components are eagerly loaded which increases initial bundle size
findings.remediation: Use React.lazy() and dynamic import() for route-level code splitting

findings.title: 1 barrel files with excessive re-exports
findings.description: Index files with >20 re-exports that may cause bundle bloat: src/lib/validators/index.ts
findings.probable_cause: Barrel exports import and re-export many modules which can prevent tree-shaking
findings.remediation: Use direct imports instead of barrel re-exports, or split into smaller barrel files

findings.title: 39 files exceed 500 lines
findings.probable_cause: Generated files are larger than recommended which may impact maintainability
findings.remediation: Consider splitting files >500 lines into smaller, focused modules

findings.title: 24 undocumented environment variables
findings.description: Environment variables used in code but not in contract: REACT_APP_API_URL, REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL, DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD, DB_SSL_CA, DB_POOL_MAX, DB_POOL_MIN, DB_IDLE_TIMEOUT, DB_CONN_TIMEOUT, DB_STATEMENT_TIMEOUT, DB_QUERY_TIMEOUT, CLIENT_ORIGIN, JWT_ISSUER, JWT_AUDIENCE, ADMIN_ORIGIN, DATABASE_URL, API_BASE_URL, LIVE_API, TEST_AUTH_TOKEN, API_URL, VITE_API_URL
findings.probable_cause: Code references environment variables not listed in the contract file
findings.remediation: Add missing variables to the environment contract file

affected_findings.title: 18 files have excessive TODOs (>10 each)
affected_findings.remediation: Replace TODO markers with actual implementation code

affected_findings.title: 57 files have elevated TODOs (>3 each)
affected_findings.remediation: Review and resolve TODO markers before deployment

affected_findings.title: 40 files have broken import paths
affected_findings.remediation: Fix import paths to reference existing modules or generate the missing modules

affected_findings.title: No lazy loading for route components
affected_findings.remediation: Use React.lazy() and dynamic import() for route-level code splitting

affected_findings.title: 1 barrel files with excessive re-exports
affected_findings.remediation: Use direct imports instead of barrel re-exports, or split into smaller barrel files

affected_findings.title: 39 files exceed 500 lines
affected_findings.remediation: Consider splitting files >500 lines into smaller, focused modules

affected_findings.title: 24 undocumented environment variables
affected_findings.remediation: Add missing variables to the environment contract file

tests.name: Artifact Location Exists
tests.description: Verify the build artifact directory exists and is readable.

tests.name: Required Files Present
tests.description: Verify critical build files exist (package.json, lock files, configuration files).

tests.name: Environment Contract Exists
tests.description: Ensure environment variable requirements are documented (.env.example, env.contract.json, .env.schema.json).

tests.name: Startup Script Declared
tests.description: Verify the system has a startup path (npm start, npm run dev, npm run build).

tests.name: Primary Workflow Executes
tests.description: Verify the main user workflow completes successfully (Create → Save → View).

tests.name: API Contract Valid
tests.description: Ensure API responses match expected schema.

tests.name: CRUD Operations Work
tests.description: Verify create, read, update, delete operations.

tests.name: Error Handling Path Works
tests.description: Verify the system handles invalid input properly.

tests.name: Secrets Exposure Scan
tests.description: Detect exposed secrets (API keys, credentials in code).

tests.name: Unsafe Config Exposure
tests.description: Detect exposed debug or admin surfaces.

tests.name: Route Load Time
tests.description: Measure page or API load latency.

tests.name: Repeated Action Stability
tests.description: Ensure repeated operations remain stable (repeat action 100 times).

tests.name: Environment Variables Declared
tests.description: Verify required environment variables are defined.

tests.name: Health Endpoint Exists
tests.description: Ensure readiness or health endpoint exists.
